channel.title: Business - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

  4. California Accuses Amazon of Price Fixing in Legal Filing  The New York Times
  5. Amazon 'strong-armed' Levi's, Hanes to hike prices on rival sites, California AG says  CNBC

item.title: Meta will record employees’ keystrokes and use it to train its AI models - TechCrunch
item.description:
1. Meta will record employees’ keystrokes and use it to train its AI models  TechCrunch
  2. Exclusive: Meta to start capturing employee mouse movements, keystrokes for AI training data  Reuters
  3. Mark Zuckerberg's Meta to all employees in America: We are installing tracking software in your machines as we need your help to ...  The Times of India
  4. Meta to track workers' clicks and keystrokes to train AI  BBC
  5. Meta to Track Employee Mouse, Keyboard Activity to Train AI Models  PCMag

item.title: S&P 500 rises, Nasdaq hits new high after U.S. extends Iran ceasefire: Live updates - CNBC
item.description:
1. S&P 500 rises, Nasdaq hits new high after U.S. extends Iran ceasefire: Live updates  CNBC
  2. Stock market today: Dow, S&P 500, Nasdaq rise, oil climbs after Trump extends US-Iran ceasefire  Yahoo Finance
  3. Nasdaq hits record high on Iran ceasefire, Q1 earnings  qz.com
  4. Oil Prices Rise as Investors Weigh Cease-Fire Extension  The New York Times
  5. Gold Steadies as Trump Extends Iran Ceasefire, Peace Talks Stall  Bloomberg.com
